output.summary: Refactored DynamicContentCarousel per planning spec: removed relatedNonSingularBehavior attribute, renamed relatedFallbackToLatest to fallbackToLatest (now applies to both automatic and related modes), added fallback logic to automatic mode PHP, wrapped related-mode Notice in BaseControl for spacing, added help text to hideIfEmpty toggle, reordered controls so hideIfEmpty appears below fallback toggle.

changes: Renamed relatedFallbackToLatest to fallbackToLatest (boolean, default true)
Updated DynamicContentCarouselAttributes type: removed relatedNonSingularBehavior, renamed relatedFallbackToLatest to fallbackToLatest
Automatic mode: added fallbackToLatest ToggleControl with help text, reordered so it appears before hideIfEmpty
Automatic mode: added help text to hideIfEmpty toggle: 'Hides the section if no posts are found.'
Related mode: wrapped Notice in BaseControl for proper margin-bottom spacing
Related mode: removed entire ToggleGroupControl for 'Behavior on non-singular pages'
Related mode: renamed relatedFallbackToLatest references to fallbackToLatest
Related mode: reordered controls: Notice, postsLimit, fallbackToLatest, hideIfEmpty
Related mode: added help text to hideIfEmpty toggle
Fixed prettier lint error on Notice component props formatting
Updated @var docblock: removed relatedNonSingularBehavior, renamed relatedFallbackToLatest to fallbackToLatest
Related mode: simplified non-singular handling -- no separate behavior toggle, uses fallbackToLatest/hideIfEmpty logic instead
Related mode: on non-singular pages, falls back to latest posts if fallbackToLatest is enabled, otherwise sets has_posts=false (letting hideIfEmpty decide visibility)
Automatic mode: added fallback logic -- when taxonomy-filtered query returns no results and fallbackToLatest is true, re-queries without taxonomy filters

variationsUpdated: Related Posts - removed relatedNonSingularBehavior, renamed to fallbackToLatest
Related Resources - removed relatedNonSingularBehavior, renamed to fallbackToLatest
Related with Fallback Disabled - renamed to fallbackToLatest
